note: seq=77 (READ-ONLY prospects/QA truth feed, on a 10-min timer so it KEEPS MOVING). Publishes status/hetzner/prospects-truth.json: (1) qualified = qa_status='pass' count + QA pass-rate + full qa distribution (so the Prospects 'Qualified' tile shows the real gate-cleared count, and reports the pass-rate); (2) render_mix HTML/JS-rendered/Hybrid derived from the tech-stack we already enrich (honest proxy, not headless render); (3) honest_zeros block asserting pipeline_value/response_rate/emails_today are TRUE zeros (verified: no email sender in codebase). NO writes. Non-blocking. Timer keeps it live for the investor view.

steps.note: seq=77: prospects/QA truth feed (qualified pass count + render-mix + honest zeros), 10-min timer

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_prospect_truth.py':'c0cf0604dce6f7b32cb84e3b2ffe23894a6868dca68c14c84e07dec8c0c2112a'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS prospects/QA truth feed (read-only)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_prospect_truth.py
TimeoutStartSec=10min

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS prospects/QA truth feed timer

[Timer]
OnBootSec=3min
OnUnitActiveSec=10min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-prospect-truth.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-prospect-truth.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-prospect-truth.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-prospect-truth.service']); print('prospect-truth timer+run kicked')"
